mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_session(session_id, actor_type, user_id, expires_at, last_active_at, revoked, deleted, created_at, updated_at) values(#{sessionId}, #{actorType}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt}, #{lastActiveAt}, #{revoked}, #{deleted}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select * from sys_user_session where session_id = #{sessionId} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update sys_user_session set revoked = 1, updated_at = now() where session_id = #{sessionId} and revoked = 0 and deleted = 0
update sys_user_session set revoked = 1, updated_at = now() where actor_type = #{actorType} and user_id = #{userId} and revoked = 0 and deleted = 0
update sys_user_session set last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt}, updated_at = now() where session_id = #{sessionId} and revoked = 0 and deleted = 0
update sys_user_session set last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_at = now() where session_id = #{sessionId} and revoked = 0 and deleted = 0
